text:
Once upon an evening, deep in a quaint little town, there lived a curious cat named Whiskers. Whiskers lived alone, except for his numerous books about distant lands. Every day after school, he'd curl up with a good tome and dream of adventures.

One afternoon, while curled up with the latest volume about the pirate adventure island of Skull Island, Whiskers heard a peculiar sound. It wasn't like anything in his books—a strange combination of a rustle and a croak.

He leapt up, his whiskers twitching. That didn't sound like a crab. He scuffled over to the window.

Outside, he spied a small frog with googly eyes. This wasn't your ordinary amphibian. This frog had a parrot head and a pirate hat hanging off its rear end!

"Arrrr!" exclaimed the parrot. "Avast! I be Captain Feathersword! Who art thou?"

Whiskers strutted up confidently, quite
